problem id: 3131bfb3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  01011101 -> 10111011
  00111100 -> 01111000
  11011001 -> 10110011
  00001100 -> 00011000
  00001000 -> 00010000
  11011010 -> 10110111
  10011000 -> 00110011
  11111100 -> 11111011
  01100111 -> 11001111
  11001010 -> 10010111

query: 01111110
predicted answer: 11111101
